subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast journeyed in the path of God! Glad tidings be unto thee of this mighty service. Therefore render thanks unto God for having enabled thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من سافر فی سبیل الله بشری لک من هذه الخدمه الکبری فاشکر الله بما وفقک علی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @love of God
